title: Billy Lemmons
compiled_truth: Billy Lemmons is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2002-05-06), Billy Lemmons sent 48 and received 181 emails, totalling 229 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (16), [Traci Warner](people/traci-warner) (15), [Sherri Sera](people/sherri-sera) (14), [John Sherriff](people/john-sherriff) (11), [Maureen Mcvicker](people/maureen-mcvicker) (10). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, analyst_associate_program, bill_williams_iii, deleted_items, ethics_ljm_notre_dame, inbox.
